Section 596, added , , ; amended , , , provided that in case of organization to which applied and which computed additions to reserve for losses on loans for taxable year under , total amount allowed under sections 243, 244, and 245 of this title for taxable year as deduction with respect to dividends received was to be reduced by amount equal to 8 percent of such total amount.Pub.
